  • Method Details

    • getLoaded

      boolean getLoaded()
      True if the chunk containing the requested position is loaded for this
bot. When false, the block field is not populated.
      bool loaded = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The loaded.

    • hasBlock

      boolean hasBlock()
      The observed block state. Absent when loaded is false.
      optional .soulfire.v1.BlockState block = 2;
      Returns:
      Whether the block field is set.

    • getBlock

      BlockState getBlock()
      The observed block state. Absent when loaded is false.
      optional .soulfire.v1.BlockState block = 2;
      Returns:
      The block.

      The observed block state. Absent when loaded is false.
      optional .soulfire.v1.BlockState block = 2;
